shadowSentences: She loves to read books every day.
We should try that new restaurant tonight.
He runs every morning to stay fit.
Traveling can be a great way to learn.
I enjoy listening to music while working.
Cooking at home is healthier and cheaper.
Weekends are perfect for relaxing and recharging.
Gardening can be a rewarding and peaceful hobby.
Volunteering helps build community and makes a difference.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about environmental awareness.
questions: Q1: Can you share a time when you took action to help the environment?
Q2: What challenges do you face when trying to be more eco-friendly?
Q3: Why do you think environmental awareness is important today?
Q4: What advice would you give someone looking to reduce their environmental impact?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about reading habits.
questions: Q1: What type of books do you enjoy reading the most?
Q2: How do you find time to read amidst your busy schedule?
Q3: In your opinion, how does reading benefit personal development?
Q4: What tips would you give to someone who wants to read more?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about the impact of exercise on health.
questions: Q1: What sports or physical activities do you enjoy the most?
Q2: Have you ever faced any barriers to exercising regularly?
Q3: How do you believe exercise influences mental health?
Q4: What encouragement would you give someone hesitant to start exercising?
